findings.issue: code-index.json is empty despite recent timestamp; builder likely failed due to file being in archive/ and not executed
findings.recommended_fix: Move code_index.py out of archive/, ensure it runs in CI, and verify INDEXED_PATHS includes active directories. Add config file to define module/endpoint discovery rules.
